# AgentGuard — Runtime Security for AI Agents
> AgentGuard is a security layer that evaluates AI agent tool calls before execution. It blocks dangerous operations, requires human approval for sensitive actions, and logs everything for audit.

## Quick Start (for AI agents)
Fetch the setup guide: GET https://api.agentguard.tech/api/v1/setup

Or try immediately without signing up:
POST https://api.agentguard.tech/api/v1/evaluate
Content-Type: application/json
{"tool": "shell_exec", "params": {"command": "rm -rf /"}}
→ Returns: {"result": "block", "reason": "Blocked by rule..."}

## How It Works
1. Before your agent executes a tool, call POST /api/v1/evaluate with the tool name and parameters
2. AgentGuard returns allow, block, monitor, or require_approval
3. If blocked, don't execute. If require_approval, wait for human.

## Sign Up (optional, for persistent audit trail)
POST https://api.agentguard.tech/api/v1/signup
{"name": "My Agent"}
→ Returns an API key for authenticated access

## SDKs
- Python: pip install agentguard
- Node.js: npm install @the-bot-club/agentguard

## Framework Integrations
LangChain, CrewAI, OpenAI Agents, Vercel AI SDK, AutoGen, Google A2A

## Links
- API: https://api.agentguard.tech
- Docs: https://agentguard.tech/docs
- Dashboard: https://app.agentguard.tech
- GitHub: https://github.com/thebotclub/AgentGuard
- Setup Guide: https://api.agentguard.tech/api/v1/setup
